name: Dropzone
description: Capture files from user with drag and drop
searchText: dropzone capture files from user with drag and drop @mantine/dropzone /x/dropzone accept acceptcolor activateonclick activateondrag activateonkeyboard autofocus disabled drageventsbubbling enablepointerevents getfilesfromevent inputprops loaderprops loading maxfiles maxsize multiple name ondragenter ondragleave ondragover ondrop ondropany onfiledialogcancel onfiledialogopen onreject openref preventdropondocument radius rejectcolor usefsaccessapi validator

props.name: accept
props.description: Mime types of the files that dropzone can accepts. By default, dropzone accepts all file types.

props.name: acceptColor
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color to set colors of Dropzone.Accept

props.name: activateOnClick
props.description: If false, disables click to open the native file selection dialog

props.name: activateOnDrag
props.description: If false, disables drag 'n' drop

props.name: activateOnKeyboard
props.description: If false, disables Space/Enter to open the native file selection dialog. Note that it also stops tracking the focus state.

props.name: autoFocus
props.description: Set to autofocus the root element

props.name: disabled
props.description: Determines whether files capturing should be disabled

props.name: dragEventsBubbling
props.description: If false, stops drag event propagation to parents

props.name: enablePointerEvents
props.description: Determines whether pointer events should be enabled on the inner element

props.name: getFilesFromEvent
props.description: Use this to provide a custom file aggregator

props.name: inputProps
props.description: Props passed down to the internal Input component

props.name: loaderProps
props.description: Props passed down to the Loader component

props.name: loading
props.description: Determines whether a loading overlay should be displayed over the dropzone

props.name: maxFiles
props.description: Maximum number of files that can be picked at once

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Maximum file size in bytes

props.name: multiple
props.description: Determines whether multiple files can be dropped to the dropzone or selected from file system picker

props.name: name
props.description: Name of the form control. Submitted with the form as part of a name/value pair.

props.name: onDragEnter
props.description: Called when the dragenter event occurs

props.name: onDragLeave
props.description: Called when the dragleave event occurs

props.name: onDragOver
props.description: Called when the dragover event occurs

props.name: onDrop
props.description: Called when valid files are dropped to the dropzone

props.name: onDropAny
props.description: Called when any files are dropped to the dropzone

props.name: onFileDialogCancel
props.description: Called when user closes the file selection dialog with no selection

props.name: onFileDialogOpen
props.description: Called when user opens the file selection dialog

props.name: onReject
props.description: Called when dropped files do not meet file restrictions

props.name: openRef
props.description: A ref function which when called opens the file system file picker

props.name: preventDropOnDocument
props.description: If false, allow dropped items to take over the current browser window

props.name: radius
props.description: Key of theme.radius or any valid CSS value to set border-radius, numbers are converted to rem

props.name: rejectColor
props.description: Key of theme.colors or any valid CSS color to set colors of Dropzone.Reject

props.name: useFsAccessApi
props.description: Set to true to use the File System Access API to open the file picker instead of using an input type="file" click event

props.name: validator
props.description: Custom validation function. It must return null if there's no errors.

type.name: <T extends File>(file: T) => FileError | FileError[] | null
